args.summary: Customer Sophia Silva (user ID: sophia_silva_7557) is requesting cancellation of travel insurance on reservation H8Q05L due to dissatisfaction with service quality. Customer purchased insurance on 5/3/2024 and is requesting an exception to the standard policy that insurance cannot be cancelled after initial booking. Customer is asking for supervisor/manager review and potential refund of insurance premium.
